description: Unified schedule manifest — single source of truth for all scheduled jobs and daemons

jobs.name: ws-memvault-synthesis
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-memvault-synthesis
jobs.description: 每日 4AM: cluster → wisdom → decay → attitude pipeline

jobs.name: ws-session-archive
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-session-archive
jobs.description: 每日 5:15AM: session lifecycle pipeline — redact sweep → scan → archive (hook 失效備援)

jobs.name: daily-briefing
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.daily-briefing
jobs.description: 每日情報簡報：金融、AI、科技、地緣政治（7:00 AM）

jobs.name: dotfiles-sync
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.dotfiles-sync
jobs.description: [已停用] 舊版 dotfiles 同步 — 已被 ws-envkit-snapshot 取代

jobs.name: ws-envkit-snapshot
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-envkit-snapshot
jobs.description: 每週一 5:30AM: 環境快照 + config 備份 + drift 偵測

jobs.name: disk-report
jobs.label: com.joneshong.disk-report
jobs.description: [已停用] 舊版每日磁碟報告 — 已合併至 system-monitor

jobs.name: ws-sysmon-weekly
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-sysmon-weekly
jobs.description: 每週一 5AM: 系統監控週報（磁碟+硬體+AI 建議）

jobs.name: ws-sysmon-monthly
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-sysmon-monthly
jobs.description: 每月 1 日 5AM: 系統監控月報（深度分析+容量規劃）

jobs.name: blink-reinstall
jobs.label: com.joneshong.blink-reinstall
jobs.description: 每 3 天自動重裝 Blink Shell（GPL build）

jobs.name: orchestrator
jobs.label: com.joneshong.orchestrator
jobs.description: [已停用] 已遷移至 stations/agent-metrics（由 workshop-services.sh 管理）

jobs.name: tmux-webui
jobs.label: com.joneshong.tmux-webui
jobs.description: tmux Web UI — WebSocket bridge（KeepAlive daemon, port 8765）

jobs.name: workshop-launcher
jobs.label: com.workshop.launcher
jobs.description: Workshop 服務啟動器（KeepAlive daemon, Core API + Redis）

jobs.name: ws-drift-check
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-drift-check
jobs.description: 每週一 6AM: 系統狀態漂移偵測（baseline diff → stdout log）

jobs.name: ws-auto-survey-wed
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-auto-survey-wed
jobs.description: 每週三 13:30: 自動填表提醒 — 每 10 分鐘 Bark 催 URL 直到收到

jobs.name: ws-auto-survey-fri
jobs.label: com.joneshong.scheduler.ws-auto-survey-fri
